title: jacea pratensis subsp. gaudinii
intro: Jacea pratensis subsp. gaudinii, also known as yellow meadow saxifrage, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Jacea pratensis subsp. gaudinii typically involve making tea or infusions from the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
